code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  mut is_space = false
  if not is_end
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    when None
      is_space = true
    end
  end

  if is_end or is_space
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          sum = sum + v * 2
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("result=#{sum}")
